attribution.suggestedText: Contains public transportation data made available by the Public Transportation Open Data Center / Association for Open Data of Public Transportation, including data provided by Tokyo Metro Co., Ltd. and the Tokyo Metropolitan Bureau of Transportation. The data has been processed for use in Jet Lag Hide and Seek.
